The '''14th Roving Line''' was a battle line of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]], assigned to attack [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] bases on the border between the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] and [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

The [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] was led by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Qarl]] aboard the [[Command ship/Legends|command cruiser]] ''[[Mantan Wanderer]]''. Other [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] included an [[Assault Frigate Mark I|assault frigate]], an [[Frigate/Legends|escort frigate]], and a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian corvette]]. The 14th Roving Line was also assigned a single [[Company/Legends|company]] of [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] troopers, including the elite [[Platoon/Legends|platoon-sized]] [[Task force/Legends|task force]] known as [[Team 19]].
